member.name: T:nxm.documents.core.idocuments_extension_service
member.summary: base interface for all documents services

member.name: T:nxm.documents.html.html_4_mail_rewriter
member.summary: scans and rewrites HTML document to be ready for sending as email

member.name: M:nxm.documents.html.html_4_mail_rewriter.process(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: process given HTML document (accessible via source URL) and return HTML Document DTO

member.name: T:nxm.documents.html.html_document_dto
member.summary: holds HTML document informations

member.summary: universal constructor requires opened stream for storage takes stream ownership

member.summary: takover control over html-stream, detach from output

member.summary: add image to document

member.summary: find image using moniker

member.summary: stream containing HTML document in text format

member.summary: images array

member.summary: get given sheet from spreadsheet as raw-query-results

member.name: T:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_service
member.summary: spreadsheet access service

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_service.create_document(System.String)
member.summary: create new document

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_service.get_document(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: retrieve existing document

member.name: T:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_document
member.summary: complete spreadsheet document (may contain many sheets)

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_document.add_spreadsheet(System.String)
member.summary: add new spreadsheet

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_document.get_spreadsheet(System.Int32)
member.summary: retrieve existing spreadsheet by position

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_document.get_spreadsheet(System.String)
member.summary: retrieve existing spreadsheet by name

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_document.save_document
member.summary: saves document in its current location

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet_document.save_document_to(System.IO.Stream,nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_save_options)
member.summary: saves document into given output stream

member.name: T:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet
member.summary: single sheets

member.name: P:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet.name
member.summary: get or set spreadsheet name (title)

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet.get_used_range
member.summary: get used range of spreadsheet

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet.set_range(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_array_})
member.summary: set data in given range of spreadsheet

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet.set_style(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: set cell style (from previously defined by using define_style)

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet.set_value(System.Int32,System.Int32,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_)
member.summary: set cell value

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet.set_formula(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: set cell formula

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.ispreadsheet.get_range(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: get data in given range of spreadsheet

member.name: T:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer
member.summary: utility to simplify writing to spreadsheet

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.row(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,System.Int32)
member.summary: sets current row

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.col(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,System.Int32)
member.summary: sets current column

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.down(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,System.Int32)
member.summary: goes iRows down

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.define_style(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,System.String,nxm.upu.core.upu_style)
member.summary: define style in current workbook (available in all worksheets)

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.value(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_)
member.summary: write value to current cell, move to next one

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.formula(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,System.String)
member.summary: write formula to current cell, moves to next one

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.style(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,System.String)
member.summary: assing defined style to current cell

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.from_raw_data(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,nxm.system.core.data.types.query_results.raw_query_results,System.Boolean)
member.summary: write 'table' at current position from given query results with optional header row move current row by number of items + (optionally) header row

member.name: M:nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer_Extensions.from_variant_collection(nxm.documents.spreadsheet.spreadsheet_writer,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_array_},nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_array_)
member.summary: write 'table' at current position from given collection with optional header row move current row by number of items + (optionally) header row

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop
member.summary: stock UPU property names

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.parse_length(System.String)
member.summary: parse length value and convert into centimeters accepted format: number only = number of centimeters suffix 'p' = number of points (1/72 of inch)

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.BACKGROUND_COLOR
member.summary: background color as well-known name or #RGB(A)

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.BORDER_COLOR
member.summary: border color as well-known name or #RGB(A) accepted format: in nxm_up_tpl file: border-color="#RGB" - all border color is #RGB in nxm_up_tpl file: border-color="#RGB;#RGB;#RGB;#RGB" - Left;Top;Right;Bottom in nxm_up_style file: #RGB;#RGB;#RGB;#RGB

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.BORDER_STYLE
member.summary: border style as well-known name: none,solid accepted format: in nxm_up_tpl file: border-style="solid" - all border style is solid in nxm_up_tpl file: border-style="solid;solid;solid;solid" - Left;Top;Right;Bottom in nxm_up_style file: solid;solid;solid;solid

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.BORDER_WIDTH
member.summary: border width (in centimeters) accepted format: in nxm_up_tpl file: border-width="1.0" - all border width is 1.0 in nxm_up_tpl file: border-width="1.0;1.0;1.0;1.0" - Left;Top;Right;Bottom in nxm_up_style file: 1.0;1.0;1.0;1.0

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.TEXT_ALIGN
member.summary: text align accepted format: in nxm_up_tpl file: text-align="left" - Left, Right, center, justify in nxm_up_style file: center

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop._eHorizontalAlign
member.summary: Types of text alignment

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.get_horizontal_alignment(System.String)
member.summary: returns the type of the text alignment

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.FONT_NAME
member.summary: font name

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.FONT_SIZE
member.summary: font size (in points!)

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.FONT_STYLE
member.summary: font style (sequence of chars 'b'-bold, 'i' - italic, 'u'- underline, 's' - strikeout)

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.font_style
member.summary: The possible values for the font_style property

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.font_style.Bold
member.summary: b - bold

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.font_style.Italic
member.summary: i - italic

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.font_style.Underline
member.summary: u - underline

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.font_style.Strikeout
member.summary: s - strikeout

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.PADDING
member.summary: padding of contener (inner margin)

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.STYLE
member.summary: name of entry in upu-styles

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.KEEP
member.summary: Keeps the entire item on one page whenever possible

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.PAGE_BREAK
member.summary: Always move the entire item to the next page

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.SOURCE
member.summary: Property for image

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.LEFT
member.summary: Left and top absolute coordinates (in centimeters)

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.WIDTH
member.summary: width (in centimeters)

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.HEIGHT
member.summary: height (in centimeters)

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.CHAR_SEPARATING
member.summary: char separating in border-color, border-style, border-width etc.

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.neutral_value
member.summary: Declaration for neutral value property

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.default_value
member.summary: Declaration for default value property

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.default_value.HTTP_EQUIV
member.summary: HTML -> HEADE -> default property

member.name: F:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.default_value.MAX_PAGES
member.summary: MAX_PAGES = defaults 5000 pages, for debug = 10 pages

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop._variant_color
member.summary: Konwersja nazwy koloru na wartość szesnastkową na podstawie strony: https://www.w3schools.com/colors/colors_names.asp

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop._variant_color.hex_2_argb(System.String)
member.summary: Konwersja koloru w postaci szesnastkowej na bajty kolejność w wyniku dla #AARRGGBB: byte[aa, rr, gg, bb] czyli [alfa, red, green, blue] kolejność w wyniku dla #RRGGBB: [red, green, blue]

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_prop.border_style
member.summary: Konwersja nazwy stylu zgodnej z CSS na styl SoutinSoft (jego numer)

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_style
member.summary: element "style"

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_style.delta(nxm.upu.core.upu_style)
member.summary: generates 'delta' style - only with new or changed properties

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_style._get_split_dec(nxm.data.core.xml.xml_reader,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Podział wartości z xml_reader wg separatora upu_prop.CHAR_SEPARATING na cztery parametry: left, top, right, bottom typu decimal

member.name: T:nxm.upu.core.upu_style_set
member.summary: styles catalogue

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_style_set.create_default
member.summary: create default style catalogue

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_style_set.apply(nxm.upu.core.upu_style,System.String)
member.summary: applies defined styles to given source style

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_style_set.load(nxm.data.core.access.iasync_data_reader,System.String)
member.summary: load style set from givent data reader

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_style_set.load_from_xml(System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: load style set from XML stream

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_style_Extensions.get_color(nxm.upu.core.upu_style,System.String,System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: converting various types of color notation into one format

member.name: M:nxm.upu.core.upu_style_Extensions.get_horizontal_alignment(nxm.upu.core.upu_style)
member.summary: returns the type of the text alignment
